name: Eric Sprott
title: Independent Precious Metals Investor
description: One of the most legendary and aggressive individual investors in gold and silver mining stocks, especially junior explorers and developers. Known for taking large stakes (often 10-40%+ of companies) via private placements and open market purchases.

portfolio.note: Owns the Cordero project in Mexico

name: Peter Schiff
title: Euro Pacific Asset Management
description: Prominent gold advocate, economist, and owning member of Euro Pacific Asset Management. Note: portfolio reflects holdings of the EuroPac Gold Fund (EPGFX), of which Schiff is an owning member; the fund is actively managed by Adrian Day.

name: Rick Rule
title: Sprott U.S. Holdings
description: Legendary natural resources investor and mining sector specialist. Rule is known for investing through Sprott U.S. Holdings vehicles and private placements; specific personal portfolio weightings are not publicly disclosed.
dataSource: Public commentary and interviews — not from filings
portfolioNote: No public 13F or portfolio disclosure available. Recommend sourcing from interview commentary or removing from investor list until verifiable data is available.

name: Ross Beaty
title: Pan American Silver, Equinox Gold (Founder/Chairman)
description: Geologist and resource entrepreneur with over 50 years of experience. Founder and Chairman of Pan American Silver Corp. (1994) and Equinox Gold Corp. (2018).
dataSource: GuruFocus insider tracking from SEC Form 4 and SEDAR+ filings

name: Don Durrett
title: Gold Stock Investor & Author
description: Well-known gold stock analyst, author, and founder of GoldStockData.com. Focused on undervalued gold and silver mining companies.

name: Adrian Day
title: Adrian Day Asset Management
description: Founder of Adrian Day Asset Management (est. 1991) and Portfolio Manager of the EuroPac Gold Fund (EPGFX). Day favors royalty companies and high-quality juniors over major producers.
dataSource: EuroPac Gold Fund (EPGFX), SEC NPORT-P, July 31, 2025

name: Rob McEwen
title: McEwen Inc.
description: Founder of McEwen Inc. (formerly McEwen Mining) and former CEO of Goldcorp.

name: Pierre Lassonde
title: Franco-Nevada (Co-Founder)
description: Co-founder of Franco-Nevada Corporation, pioneer of the gold royalty business model.
dataSource: TipRanks insider tracking and public director filings

name: Jon Binder
title: Founder, GoldSignal.ai
description: Personal precious metals portfolio tracked since 2018. Positions are hand-curated and updated by Jon directly.
dataSource: Personal portfolio — not from SEC filing
portfolioNote: Update via Google Sheet sync or admin when positions are ready to publish.
